zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Braose於大約1173年出生在英國素可布拉波時，她的父親William de Braose21歲，母親Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber19歲。她於1189年與Gruffydd II ap Rhys結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1210年12月29日之前在英國威爾斯，埋葬在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Braose于大约1173年出生在英国素可布拉波时，她的父亲William de Braose21岁，母亲Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber19岁。她于1189年与Gruffydd II ap Rhys结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1210年12月29日之前在英国威尔斯，埋葬在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾斯特拉塔 福洛利達。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Braose was born about 1173, in Bramber, Sussex, England, her father, William de Braose, was 21 and her mother, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, was 19. She married Gruffydd II ap Rhys in 1189. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 29 December 1210, in Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Braose est née environ 1173, à Bramber, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William de Braose, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffydd II ap Rhys en 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 29 décembre 1210, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1189 Gruffydd II ap Rhys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 29. Dezember 1210 in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Strata Florida, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Braoseが約1173年にイギリススセックスブランバーで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは21歳，母Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramberは19歳であった。1189年にGruffydd II ap Rhysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1210年12月29日以前にイギリスウェールズで死去し，イギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアストラタ フロリダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Braose(이)가 대략 1173년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1189년 Gruffydd II ap Rhys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1210년 12월 29일 이전 영국 웨일스에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 스트라타 플로리다에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Braose родилась около 1173 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Braose было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de St Valéry Lady of Bramber, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffydd II ap Rhys в 1189 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 29 декабрь 1210 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности страта флорида, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
